name: # SCENARIO <name>: Given <dependency>; When <head order>; Then <tail protection>; Repeat <count/window>.
# Chain rule: use ORIGIN-tail-closed to release the next row only after the origin tail closes successfully.
# Price rule: the first row places a last-price buy stop 10 USD above the current reference; the other rows use market heads after their dependency is released.
# Tail rule: qAtDpD + tp=5 means a relative trailing stop 5 USD from the filled head price.

# SCENARIO CHAIN_BUY_STOP_PLUS10: Given no dependency; When the strategy starts; Then place a last-price buy stop 10 USD above current price and protect the filled long with a reduce-only sell stop 5 USD below fill. Repeat up to 3 attempts during the day.

# SCENARIO CHAIN_SELL_AFTER_LONG_TAIL: Given CHAIN_BUY_STOP_PLUS10 tail closed; When released; Then sell at market and protect the filled short with a reduce-only buy stop 5 USD above fill. Repeat up to 3 releases during the day.

# SCENARIO CHAIN_BUY_AFTER_SHORT_TAIL: Given CHAIN_SELL_AFTER_LONG_TAIL tail closed; When released; Then buy at market and protect the filled long with a reduce-only sell stop 5 USD below fill. Repeat up to 3 releases during the day.
